MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Wayne Snodgrass, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4675 for defendants and moving parties HEATHER FONG, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT, LOUISE RENNE, THERESA SPARKS, DAVID CAMPOS, JOE VERONESE, PETRA DEJESUS, YVONNE LEE, JOE MARSHALL

RULING:
THE COURT RESPONED TO THE 170.3 CHALLENGE FILED BY PETITIONER TO JUDGE BUSCH BY STATING THAT SUCH A CHALLENGE NEEDS TO BE PERSONNALY SERVED INSTEAD OF FILED. JUDGE BUSCH STATED THAT HE WOULD BE WILLING TO ACCEPT SERVICE. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL DECIDED TO WITHDREW HIS 170.3 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE BUSCH.
MATTER WAS ARGUED and the Court took UNDER SUBMISSION RESPONDENTS HEATHER FONG, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT, LOUISE RENNE, THERESA SPARKS, DAVID CAMPOS, JOE VERONESE, PETRA DEJESUS, YVONNE LEE, JOE MARSHALL'S AMENDED DEMURRER. Counsel shall submit proposed forms of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/JF)
